---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size50[.center[

Welcome to our local stakeholders working on environmental policy!

]]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. Save ten minutes at end for assignment for next week



---

The who!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle, slideblue

## Paper 1: Write a report introducing us to the specific, local environmental problem you intend to target this semester

.size35[
+ Why is this an "environmental" issue?

+ Who is this a "problem" for? Be specific.

+ What are the causes of the problem you want to focus on?

+ What data is available to allow us to measure any progress?
]

???



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

# For Tuesday: Brainstorming
.size40[
+ Bring to class a news story or piece of evidence describing a local environmental problem

+ Be ready to present it to the class:
    + What is the specific problem?
    + Who are the key stakeholders?
    + How could we measure progress?
]

???

Let's get to work on the paper!

Everybody brings in a case (or two for EC!) we can discuss on Tuesday.

<br>

### Questions?
